stocks.name: Apple
stocks.summary: Apple's recent price action shows a strong 13.0% gain over the past month, with the stock now sitting at its 52-week high. Investors will be watching for signs of continued momentum in the tech sector to see if Apple can maintain its upward trajectory.

Key to this will be the company's ability to drive growth in its cloud and software businesses.
